name: Radar Signal Processing Module
summary: Primary signal-processing board for the Gagetown radar support upgrade. Final assembly in Canada, but two sub-components were sourced through an offshore supply chain.

provenance.label: Part registered on ledger
provenance.detail: Component logged against the radar procurement workflow.

provenance.label: Component origins declared
provenance.detail: Supplier declared component sourcing across Canada, United States and China.

provenance.label: Custody transferred to base
provenance.detail: Module received by CFB Gagetown procurement receiving.

provenance.label: Origin review flag raised
provenance.detail: Component origin includes China; flagged for human review per supply-chain policy.

name: Antenna Array Controller
summary: Controls the steering of the radar antenna array. Fully sourced and assembled in Canada by a controlled-goods registered supplier.
